## 1. Executive Summary

| Dimension | pixel-studio v2.0.0 | daily v0.1.0 |
|---|---|---|
| Architecture | Monolith JS (68KB app.js, 1853 lines) | Componentized React + TS6 |
| Build | Zero (CDN + script tags) | Vite 8 + TypeScript 6 |
| Test Coverage | Zero | 1 basic Vitest |
| Desktop | Tauri v2 (4 plugins, no custom cmds) | Tauri v2 (9 cmd modules) |
| Core Issue | Change-phobia: single file 68KB | Detail flaws: light mode bug, undefined CSS vars |

## 2. Code Architecture (Galileo)

### 2.1 pixel-studio: ES Module Split (3 phases)
- Phase 1 (3d): Extract non-rendering modules (color utils, palette gen, plugin loader)
- Phase 2 (4d): Split core rendering (engine, renderer, layers, animation, history)
- Phase 3 (1d): Introduce Vite + ES Module, pure functions

### 2.2 daily: Zustand Store Split
- Single appStore.ts (200 lines, 5 domains, 40+ methods)
- Split into: useNoteStore / useClipboardStore / useUIStore / useSettingsStore (1 week)

### 2.3 TS Migration (pixel-studio, 6.5-8.5d)
Config (0.5d) -> Type defs (2d) -> JS->TS rename (1d) -> Strict mode (3-5d)

## 3. Tech Stack & Performance (Descartes)

### 3.1 Performance ROI Ranking (pixel-studio)
1. Layer data string[][] -> Uint8ClampedArray (1 week, 40x blend speedup)
2. fillRect per-pixel -> putImageData single call (2 weeks, 15x render speedup)
3. Dirty rectangle + RAF throttle (2 weeks, 60fps brush drag)
4. Vite + module split (2-3 weeks)
5. WASM Rust pipeline (3-5 weeks, 10-50x)

### 3.2 Performance ROI Ranking (daily)
1. Fix window.rs set_background_color (10 min)
2. Zustand store split + useShallow (1 week)
3. @tanstack/virtual virtual scrolling (2-3 days)
4. React.lazy code splitting (1-2 days)
5. useOptimistic optimistic updates (1-2 days)

## 4. Distribution & Ecosystem (Darwin)

### 4.1 pixel-studio Trinity Distribution
- GitHub Pages: Configured but 404 (5 min fix)
- PWA: manifest + sw.js ready, update version + screenshots (10 min)
- Desktop: No CI, no updater -> configure release.yml + auto-updater (2.5h)
- Web Component <pixel-canvas>: Zero to MVP (3 days)

### 4.2 daily Desktop Distribution
- 14 Releases on GitHub, fix version naming in installer (30 min)
- Auto-updater: empty shell -> generate keys + latest.json (3h)
- winget/chocolatey/scoop: submit manifests (4h)
